channel.title: Transmission on Xizi's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Transmission on Xizi's Blog

item.title: Transmission的安装、配置、制作PT种子torrent做种
item.description: 安装Transmission apt install transmission-daemon 配置Transmission 先停止Transmission systemctl stop transmission-daemon.service 然后编辑配置文件/var/lib/tran
